title: pyrethrum montanum
intro: Pyrethrum montanum, also known as mountain pyrethrum or mountain daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pyrethrum montanum include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, relieve headaches and fever, and even reduce the severity of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum montanum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
